libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For tests that invoke OpenAiChatModel, OpenAiEmbeddingModel, OpenAiImageModel, OpenAiAudioSpeechModel, OpenAiAudioTranscriptionModel, or OpenAiModerationModel, configure options programmatically with a local OpenAI-compatible base URL, e.g. .baseUrl("http://127.0.0.1:<port>/v1"), and .apiKey("") for no-auth mode or a dummy key. Serve minimal OpenAI-compatible responses from an in-process JDK HttpServer rather than calling https://api.openai.com/v1 or relying on OPENAI_API_KEY. If testing Spring property-based configuration, set spring.ai.openai.base-url and spring.ai.openai.api-key to equivalent local test values. Avoid Azure/Microsoft Foundry/GitHub Models environment-detection paths unless intentionally covering them.
risks: The OpenAI Java SDK response parsers are strict enough that local stub responses must match the expected endpoint JSON shape.
Azure/Microsoft Foundry passwordless paths rely on optional azure-identity classes and are not needed for normal OpenAI-provider coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is required, but meaningful model-call coverage needs tests to avoid the default live OpenAI endpoint and real API-key lookup.
